name: glm52_rocm_upload_routed_expert_gate_up_decode
description: Single upload task for GLM-5.2 ROCm: Routed Expert Gate/Up Decode (routed_expert_gate_up_decode).

axis_semantics.prefill_M: Prefill token count / sequence length. These are the visible input shapes 1024, 2048, and 4096.
axis_semantics.decode_M: Decode batch size / active query count for one decode step. This is a different axis from prefill sequence length.

tasks.label: Routed Expert Gate/Up Decode
tasks.notes: Represents the gate side of the runtime gate/up fused MoE path; add moe_up_proj_decode separately if the up half must be scored independently.
